Package com.irurueta.units

Class FrequencyConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.FrequencyConverter
  • public class FrequencyConverter
extends java.lang.Object
    Does frequency conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying frequency measurements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      (package private) static double HERTZ_PER_GIGAHERTZ
      Number of Hertz's in one GigaHertz.
      (package private) static double HERTZ_PER_MEGAHERTZ
      Number of Hertz's in one MegaHertz.
      (package private) static double HERTZ_PER_TERAHERTZ
      Number of HErtz's in one TeraHertz.
      (package private) static double HERTZS_PER_KILOHERTZ
      Number of Hertz's in one KiloHertz.

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static double convert​(double input, FrequencyUnit inputUnit, FrequencyUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a frequency value from input unit to provided output unit.

      Converts a frequency value from input unit to provided output unit.

      Converts a frequency to requested output unit.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Frequency input,
                           Frequency output)
        Converts a frequency to provided output frequency unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input frequency to be converted.
        output - output frequency where result will be stored and containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static Frequency convertAndReturnNew​(Frequency input,
                                            FrequencyUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a frequency to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input frequency to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        Returns:
        converted frequency.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Frequency frequency,
                           FrequencyUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updates a frequency to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        frequency - input frequency to be converted and updated.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Frequency input,
                           FrequencyUnit outputUnit,
                           Frequency result)
        Converts a frequency to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input frequency to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - frequency unit where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input,
                                       FrequencyUnit inputUnit,
                                       FrequencyUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a frequency value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - frequency value.
        inputUnit - input frequency unit.
        outputUnit - output frequency unit.
        Returns:
        converted frequency value.

      • convert

        public static double convert​(double input,
                             FrequencyUnit inputUnit,
                             FrequencyUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a frequency value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - frequency value.
        inputUnit - input frequency unit.
        outputUnit - output frequency unit.
        Returns:
        converted frequency value.

      • hertzToKiloHertz

        public static double hertzToKiloHertz​(double hertz)
        Converts provided Hertz value to KiloHertz.
        Parameters:
        hertz - hertz value.
        Returns:
        same amount of frequency converted to KiloHertz.
